fact_nuggets.text: Unseen Fist (Japanese: Invisible Fist) is an Ability introduced during Generation VIII, in The Isle of Armor. It is the signature Ability of Urshifu.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Affected moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When using a contact move, Pokemon with Unseen Fist ignore protection moves in effect for their targets, except Max Guard . This applies even if the user is holding Protective Pads , but does not apply if the user is holding a Punching Glove , as it turns punching moves into non-contact moves. Affected moves [ edit | edit source ] The table below lists the moves affected by Unseen Fist, as well as the forms of Urshifu that can learn those moves. Move Type Cat. Pow. Acc. Single Strike Style Rapid Strike Style Acrobatics Flying Physical 55 100 Aerial Ace Flying Physical 60 Aqua Jet Water Physical 40 100 Assurance Dark Physical 60 100 Body Press Fighting Physical 80 100 Body Slam Normal Physical 85 100 Brick Break Fighting Physical 75 100 Close Combat Fighting Physical 120 100 Crunch Dark Physical 80 100 Darkest Lariat Dark Physical 85 100 Dig Ground Physical 80 100 Dive Water Physical 80 100 Drain Punch Fighting Physical 75 100 Dynamic Punch Fighting Physical 100 50 Facade Normal Physical 70 100 False Swipe Normal Physical 40 100 Fire Punch Fire Physical 75 100 Focus Punch Fighting Physical 150 100 Foul Play Dark Physical 95 100 Giga Impact Normal Physical 150 90 Headbutt Normal Physical 70 100 Ice Punch Ice Physical 75 100 Iron Head Steel Physical 80 100 Liquidation Water Physical 85 100 Low Kick Fighting Physical 100 Low Sweep Fighting Physical 65 100 Mega Kick Normal Physical 120 75 Mega Punch Normal Physical 80 85 Payback Dark Physical 50 100 Poison Jab Poison Physical 80 100 Retaliate Normal Physical 70 100 Revenge Fighting Physical 60 100 Reversal Fighting Physical 100 Rock Smash Fighting Physical 40 100 Sucker Punch Dark Physical 70 100 Superpower Fighting Physical 120 100 Surging Strikes Water Physical 25 100 Throat Chop Dark Physical 80 100 Thunder Punch Electric Physical 75 100 U-turn Bug Physical 70 100 Waterfall Water Physical 80 100 Wicked Blow Dark Physical 75 100 Zen Headbutt Psychic Physical 80 90 Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Unseen Fist has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When using a contact move, Pokemon with Unseen Fist ignore protection moves in effect for their targets, except Max Guard . This applies even if the user is holding Protective Pads , but does not apply if the user is holding a Punching Glove , as it turns punching moves into non-contact moves.
